heading: Robotic or human servicing of spacecraft
label: 70508 Robotic or human servicing of spacecraft
text: The Administrator shall take all necessary steps to ensure that provision is made in the design and construction of all future observatory-class scientific spacecraft intended to be deployed in Earth orbit or at a Lagrangian point in space for robotic or human servicing and repair to the extent practicable and appropriate.
